headline: Framework Laptop 13 Pro Preorders Might Cost Less
summary: Good news for Framework Laptop 13 Pro preorders: your device might be cheaper. The CEO dubs it the "MacBook Pro for Linux users." This price drop comes despite a tough component crisis.

headline: Grab a Discounted Xbox Before Prices Increase
summary: Microsoft is hiking Xbox console prices for the second time in a year. The increase is due to rising memory costs impacting the industry. Find Prime Day deals now to save before the price jump.

headline: Instagram Expands to Smart TVs with New Features
summary: Instagram launched new features for its smart TV app this week. The goal is to maximize user screen time on the biggest displays. Features include vertical Reels, available on Amazon Fire TV and Google TV.

headline: Apple Raises Prices Amidst Severe RAM Crisis
summary: Apple has increased prices across nearly all its products. This signals a serious and widespread RAM component crisis. Even Apple, with its huge margins, can't absorb these rising costs.

headline: Kingdom Hearts Keyblade Hits Record Low Price on Amazon
summary: Score a Kingdom Hearts Keyblade replica at its lowest price ever on Amazon. This exclusive Prime Day deal is perfect for fans. Don't miss this limited-time offer.

headline: Nintendo Switch 2 Console on Sale for $399 for Prime Day
summary: The brand new Nintendo Switch 2 gaming console is available at a special Prime Day price. Get the console for as low as $399. This is a significant discount on the latest model.

headline: Massive $2,500 Discount on Alienware Area-51 Gaming PC
summary: Save $2,500 on an Alienware Area-51 Gaming PC. This powerhouse includes an RTX 5090 GPU, 64GB RAM, and a 4TB SSD. Warning: despite the huge discount, it remains a premium, expensive machine.

headline: Prime Day Deal: Portable Turbo Fan for Just $8.49
summary: Beat the summer heat with this incredibly affordable portable turbo fan. Grab it for only $8.49 during Amazon Prime Day. Stay cool and comfortable with this handy gadget.

headline: King Charles Discloses £12.9M Tax Payment for 2024-25
summary: King Charles has revealed he paid £12.9 million in tax for 2024-25. He is the first monarch to publicly disclose their tax payments. This figure places him among the UK's top 100 taxpayers.

headline: King Charles and Queen Camilla to Remain in Clarence House
summary: King Charles and Queen Camilla will not move into Buckingham Palace. They plan to continue residing at Clarence House. This decision comes despite ongoing renovations at the Palace.

headline: UK Records Hottest June Day, Prepares for Hottest June Night
summary: The UK experienced its warmest day of the year, hitting 36.7C in Somerset. This temperature marks the hottest June day on record. The country now anticipates its hottest June night ever.

headline: Europe's Heatwave Poses Risk to Young People, Shifts Eastward
summary: A dangerous heatwave is moving across Europe, now shifting east. French officials warn of heat-related deaths, even among young people. Temperatures could reach 40C in parts of Germany.
